settings.title: Company profile
settings.subtitle: This data is used on all issued documents
settings.logoHint: PNG/JPG/SVG, up to 500KB. Shown on invoices.
settings.name: Name *
settings.vatWarnNoReg: A VAT number is entered, but the status is „Not registered“. If the company is VAT registered, choose „VAT registered“.
settings.vatWarnNeedNo: With „VAT registered“ a VAT number is required.
settings.designLabel: Invoice design — your plan includes {label} templates
settings.upgradeMore: More templates are available in a higher plan.
settings.logoPaidHint: The invoice logo is available only on paid plans (Start, Business, Pro).

businessProfile.title: Business profile (Smart Workspace)
businessProfile.subtitle: Determines only the dashboard layout — all features remain available at all times.
businessProfile.confirmApply:
Would you like us to apply the recommended dashboard layout for the new business type?

OK = Yes, apply · Cancel = Keep my current dashboard

vat.title: VAT settings
vat.subtitle: These settings apply automatically when creating each new invoice. You can change them only for a specific invoice.
vat.warnHasNo: Warning: a VAT number is entered ({vat}), but the status is „Unregistered“. If the company is VAT registered, choose „Registered“ so VAT is charged on invoices.
vat.autoExempt: Since the company is not VAT registered, new invoices will automatically be without VAT, on grounds of art. 113(9) of the VAT Act.
vat.noVatDefault: Do not charge VAT by default

email.title: Email notifications
email.subtitle: Choose which automatic emails to receive. Security emails (password, login) are always sent.

docSharing.title: Document exchange between companies
docSharing.subtitle: When you issue a document to a company that is also registered on the platform (by company ID), it is automatically delivered to its inbox and it receives a notification.
docSharing.toggleHint: Turn off if you prefer to send your documents personally (by email/by hand).

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: Deleting the company profile is irreversible. All data — invoices, clients, documents, warehouses — will be removed forever.
danger.reasonPh: Why are you deleting your profile?
danger.agree: I understand that this action is irreversible and confirm the deletion of the company profile.

previewPage.heading: Template preview: {name}
previewPage.note: This is a sample invoice with sample data. To apply this template, select it in Company profile.

invite.heading: Add user
invite.added: ✓ The user was added to the company.
invite.intro: Enter the person's names, email and role. If they don't have an account yet, a profile will be created — they activate access by registering with the same email.
invite.roleHint: The employee gets access only to their personal portal (salary, leave, documents) — not to business data.
